segments.text: This player's put in serious work
segments.original_text: この人はね、相当な数やってきてるでしょうから

segments.text: That forward smash—they've eaten that so many times
segments.original_text: あの横スマッシュもね、何度食らったことだって感じですよね

segments.text: Wow, that's strong play from Muramachi!
segments.original_text: あ、これ強いなぁ村町、なるほどね
崖離し空後でちょうど乗るんですね

segments.text: Now they're mixing neutral B into their game
segments.original_text: さぁNBを読み合いに組み込んできましたね

segments.text: That's creating a lot of noise
segments.original_text: あれが結構ノイズになっていて

full_text: This player's put in serious work That forward smash—they've eaten that so many times Wow, that's strong play from Muramachi! Ledge drop bair lands perfectly! Now they're mixing neutral B into their game That's creating a lot of noise Yeah yeah yeah From that spin onwards

corrections.rule: move abbreviation: ムービー→空後
